brand_brief: CalcFlow is a sleek, no-nonsense calculator built for users who value precision and elegance in everyday tools. The brand exudes quiet confidence — minimal, dark, and sharp — appealing to developers, students, and productivity-focused professionals. It transforms a mundane utility into a premium micro-experience.
logo_prompt: A minimal dark-mode logo for an app called CalcFlow. Design a geometric symbol combining a sleek infinity-like flow curve integrated with a subtle grid or bracket symbol, rendered in a smooth gradient from violet #7C3AED to emerald green #10B981. The icon sits centered on a near-black #0A0A0F circular or rounded-square background. Style is ultra-clean, modern SaaS, no gradients on the background, sharp vector edges, minimal details, professional and premium feel. The wordmark CalcFlow appears below in a bold geometric sans-serif font in white.
icon_style: Minimal geometric flow-curve icon with a purple-to-emerald gradient on a dark rounded-square background, clean vector style
